name: 1q21_1_proximal_TAR_region
description: 1q21.1 proximal segmental-duplication block (BP2-BP3) immediately distal to the centromere-proximal SDs of chromosome 1q. Deletion of this segment is associated with Thrombocytopenia-Absent-Radius (TAR) syndrome (RBM8A locus). The flanking SDs share high (>95%) identity and drive NAHR-mediated recurrent CNVs.

architecture.internal_structure: Two SD clusters (BP2 and BP3) ~200-400 kb each, flanking a ~500 kb unique interval containing RBM8A, LIX1L, PIAS3 and HFE2; SDs contain GJA8, GPR89A/B and BCL9 paralogs.
